theme: rearrange a librarian's errands to stop re-shelving
title: Grid Librarian: Reordering Errands to Stop Re-Shelving
strategies: topological order by ascending errand id, cart-blind (trivial)
recover hidden reading-list collections via union-find on shared read addresses, then commit to one collection at a time (race its clearances, batch its consultations) (strong)
true optimal cache-oblivious / dependence-respecting schedule (open ceiling, unreached)
